# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
description: A Helm chart for my application
type: application
version: 0.1.0

dependencies:
  - name: nginx-ingress
    version: "1.0.0"
    repository: "https://charts.nginx.org"

templates:
  - name: deployment.yaml
    data: |
      apiVersion: apps/v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
        name: {{ .Release.Name }}
        labels:
          app: {{ .Release.Name }}
      spec:
        replicas: 1
        selector:
          matchLabels:
            app: {{ .Release.Name }}
        template:
          metadata:
            labels:
              app: {{ .Release.Name }}
          spec:
            containers:
              - name: {{ .Release.Name }}
                image: "my-app:latest"
                ports:
                  - containerPort: 80

  - name: service.yaml
    data: |
      apiVersion: v1
      kind: Service
      metadata:
        name: {{ .Release.Name }}
      spec:
        type: ClusterIP
        ports:
          - port: 80
            targetPort: 80
        selector:
          app: {{ .Release.Name }}

  - name: ingress.yaml
    data: |
      apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
      kind: Ingress
      metadata:
        name: {{ .Release.Name }}
        annotations:
          nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/use-http2: "true"
      spec:
        rules:
          - host: '*'
            http:
              paths:
                - path: /
                  pathType: Prefix
                  backend:
                    service:
                      name: {{ .Release.Name }}
                      port:
                        number: 80
